title: Puppy
overview: A poor family from North Karnataka moves to Bangalore in search of a better life. Their journey takes an unexpected turn when they find a lost puppy belonging to a wealthy family. As the bond between the boy and the puppy deepens, a heartwarming tale unfolds, blending humor and emotion to celebrate the pure connection between two innocent souls
